title: Vibrant Gender Reveal Party Table Cover (137cm x 213cm) - Multicolor Plastic Tablecloth, Spill-resistant & Bold Design - Perfect For Your Big Surprise - 1 Pc, 54"x84"
features: MULTICOLOR MAGIC: Our vibrant gender reveal party table cover adds a splash of color and excitement to your big surprise event, making it an unforgettable moment for everyone involved.

HIGH-QUALITY PLASTIC MATERIAL: Crafted with durability in mind, this spill-resistant tablecloth ensures a quick and easy cleanup after the party, so you can spend more time celebrating your new addition.

PERFECT FOR YOUR BIG SURPRISE: Our specially designed table cover is the ideal complement to your gender reveal decorations and theme, enhancing the atmosphere and creating a memorable experience for all your guests.

CONVENIENT & USER-FRIENDLY: Measuring 137cm x 213cm, our table cover perfectly fits most standard-sized tables, ensuring a fuss-free setup and removal, giving you more time to enjoy the party with your loved ones.

BOOST YOUR EVENT'S APPEAL: Choose our vibrant gender reveal party table cover for a unique and captivating touch, helping you create the perfect setting for your gender reveal event that everyone will be talking about.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Lovely Pink Powder Blue Gender Reveal Party Add-On Items What will baby be? What do you think? Boy or Girl? Blue or Pink? Add some fun and mystery to your special occasion and impress your guests with these simple and elegant designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More coordinating ranges available! Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights! And if Gender Reveal Party isn't your style, check out our other elegant options.
